title: Pinalia excavata
taxonomy: Pinalia excavata is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Pinalia, which is a group of orchids that are often referred to as the "Pinalia alliance". The classification of Pinalia excavata is further supported by its inclusion in the APG III classification system. As part of the Orchidaceae family, Pinalia excavata is closely related to other orchid species. The classification of Pinalia excavata is subject to ongoing research and revisions in the field of botany.

intro: Pinalia excavata, also known as the Excavated Pinalia, is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
